questions.statement: The image formed on retina of human eye is
options: More than one of the above /

questions.statement: For a spherical mirror, the distance between the pole and the centre of the curvature is:&nbsp;
options: half of the radius of curvature&nbsp; /
twice the distance between pole and F&nbsp; /
equal to the distance between c and F&nbsp; /
More than one of the above /

questions.statement: White light is a mixture of how many colors
options: More than one of the above&nbsp; &nbsp; /

questions.statement: The diffusion of light in the atmosphere takes place due to the presence of which of the following?
questions.explanation: <p>The light diffuses in the atmosphere due to the presence of dust particles. It is the reason for the colour changes of the sky.</p>

questions.statement: For a light ray travelling from denser to a rarer medium, if angle of incidence is equal to the critical angle, then the angle of refraction is:
options: More than one of the above&nbsp; &nbsp; /
